Active Planned Care / GoalsStart DateReason
Hyperlipidemia clinical management plan31-Dec-2000Hyperlipidemia
  • Achieve and maintain LDL cholesterol below 70 mg/dL to reduce cardiovascular risk.
  • Achieve and maintain fasting triglycerides below 150 mg/dL.
  • Maintain HDL cholesterol above 50 mg/dL.
Lifestyle education regarding hypertension05-Dec-1999Essential hypertension (disorder)
  • Patient will achieve and maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
  • Patient will demonstrate understanding of recommended lifestyle changes for hypertension, including diet, exercise, and sodium reduction.
Diabetes self management plan11-Nov-1956Prediabetes
  • Patient will implement and maintain a diabetes self-management plan including dietary modifications, regular physical activity, blood glucose monitoring, and medication adherence as appropriate.
  • Patient will achieve and maintain hemoglobin A1c within individualized target range to reduce risk of diabetes complications.
